mapper.select: SELECT LIKE_ID, PLAYLIST_ID, USER_ID, CREATED_AT, DELETED_AT FROM PLAYLIST_LIKES WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE PLAYLIST_LIKES SET DELETED_AT = NULL, CREATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETED_AT IS NOT NULL
